hero.subtitle_html: The only game where <1>22 human players</1> control every position on the field. Each turn you decide: move, pass, shoot, dribble or intercept. Create your athlete or take charge as a manager — your career starts now.

create.title: Create your Character
create.desc: Choose Player or Manager. Pick your position, name, and start your journey.

train.title: Train and Evolve
train.desc: Spend energy training 30+ attributes. The more you train, the stronger you get.

play.title: Play Real Matches
play.desc: Step onto the pitch with other humans. Every turn: move, pass, shoot, intercept.

green.label: Green arrows
green.desc: show player movement on the field.

orange.label: Orange arrows
orange.desc: represent shots on goal with direction and power.

purple.label: Purple circle
purple.desc: appears when you can intercept the ball. Click to act!

items.0: Control your athlete every turn of the match
items.2: Negotiate contracts and wages with clubs
items.3: Buy items from the shop: boots, energy drinks, personal trainer
items.4: Build reputation and raise your overall

items.0: Set the lineup and tactical formation
items.1: Sign human players in the market
items.2: Handle finances: wages, gate receipts, facilities
items.3: Upgrade the stadium and training center
items.4: Send friendly invites and compete in the league

turn_based.title: Turn-Based Matches
turn_based.desc: Each turn has 3 phases: positioning, action and resolution. Every decision counts.

humans.title: 22 Human Players
humans.desc: Every position on the field controlled by a real player. Real football.

club.title: Full Club Management
club.desc: Lineup, tactical formation, signings, finances and stadium.

attributes.title: 30+ Trainable Attributes
attributes.desc: Speed, passing, shooting, vision, strength, stamina and much more.

league.title: Competitive League
league.desc: 20 clubs, 19 rounds, real standings, top scorers and prizes.

economy.title: Realistic Economy
economy.desc: Weekly wages, transfers, matchday revenue, facilities.

store.title: Item Shop
store.desc: Boots, gloves, energy drinks, personal trainer — it all impacts the pitch.

community.title: Active Community
community.desc: Built-in forum with discussions, tactics, suggestions and reports.

final_cta.subtitle: Sign up for free and step onto the pitch right now.
